title: Liquid Fog Begone
description: A simple mod that allows you to control how dense the fog is while underwater or in lava.
body:
# Summary
**A simple mod that allows for the you to control the opacity of fog while under water or in lava, allowing you to see much further than vanilla. Lets you see through completely for easy PVP or adventuring!**

# Configuration
This mod includes configurations allowing you to fine-tune the level of opacity for the fog while in water or lava, as well as configure the behavior of the flames overlay while on fire.

# Dependencies
This mod requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/project/9s6osm5g) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/project/mOgUt4GM)

![Water Fog Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33382a9aa62f44345d0e5bbefe87cac061a9fe60.jpeg)
![Lava Fog Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/974d621228cf3c4c330411ccac3924cdf0a5e765.jpeg)
